description: Connect to Azure Blob Storage to read, write, and manage files in containers. Upload data exports, download reports, generate shareable links, and more.

credential_fields.label: Connection String
credential_fields.help: Found in Azure Portal → Storage Account → Access keys

operations.name: List Containers
operations.description: List all blob containers in the storage account

operations.name: List Files
operations.description: List files in a container, optionally filtered by prefix (folder path)

parameters.name: container
parameters.label: Container Name
parameters.description: The blob container to list files from

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.label: Folder/Prefix
parameters.description: Optional path prefix to filter results (e.g., 'reports/2024/')

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.label: Max Results
parameters.description: Maximum number of files to return (max 5000)

operations.name: Upload File
operations.description: Upload content to a file in a container. For text files (CSV, JSON, etc.), pass content directly. For binary files, pass base64-encoded content with encoding='base64'.

parameters.name: container
parameters.label: Container Name
parameters.description: The blob container to upload to

operations.name: Download File
operations.description: Download a file's content from a container. Text files are returned as text, binary files as base64.

parameters.name: container
parameters.label: Container Name
parameters.description: The blob container to download from

parameters.name: object_name
parameters.label: File Path/Name
parameters.description: Path of the file to download

operations.name: Delete File
operations.description: Delete a file from a container

parameters.name: object_name
parameters.label: File Path/Name
parameters.description: Path of the file to delete

operations.name: Get File Info
operations.description: Get metadata for a file including size, content type, last modified date, and etag

operations.name: Generate Shareable URL
operations.description: Generate a time-limited SAS URL for direct access to a file. Useful for sharing files or allowing direct downloads.

parameters.name: expiry_hours
parameters.label: URL Expiry (hours)
parameters.description: How long the URL should be valid (max 24 hours)

setup_instructions:
## Azure Blob Storage Setup

### Step 1: Get Connection String
1. Go to [Azure Portal](https://portal.azure.com)
2. Navigate to your **Storage Account**
3. Click **Access keys** under Security + networking
4. Copy the **Connection string** for key1

### Step 2: Configure in AI Hub
1. Paste the connection string
2. Test the connection

The connection string contains the account name, key, and endpoint — no other configuration needed.
